The apparent affinity constant between Ac-i-Trp and the formed chiral recognition site, which was constructed by the presence of i-isomer during the molecular imprinting process, was determined by the following procedure: the difference in the shift (A0)s, between that for Ac-i-Trp, which was adsorbed not only on the chiral recognition site toward i-isomer but also on the non-specific region, and that for Ac-j-Trp, which was non-specifically adsorbed, was
